---
title: "Double integrals and Line integrals in the plane"
chapter: "18.02 - Multivariable calculus"
author: "TgX.2"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-title: "Mục lục bài viết"
    toc-location: right
    css: ../styles.css
    include-in-header:
      text: | 
        <script src="../navigation.js" defer></script>
---

___
# Double integrals


___
# Exchanging order of integration


___
# Integration in polar coordinates

___
# Change of variables


___
# Vector fields


___
# Work and line integrals


___
# Geometric approach



___
# Physical interpretation



___
# Test for gradient fields



___
# Green’s theorem



___
# Flux



___
# Simply connected regions



___
# End
